content.text: {"id":"KB-005","title":"Gold Tier Membership Benefits","category":"membership","summary":"Perks and benefits for Gold tier members.","body":"Gold tier members enjoy: free standard shipping on all orders, extended 45-day return window (vs standard 30 days), early access to sales and new products, a dedicated support line, and 2x loyalty points on all purchases. Gold status is earned by spending $500 or more in a 12-month period.","url":"https://help.example.com/membership/gold-benefits","last_updated":"2026-01-20"}
